returns.amountOut: The actual amount of output tokens received.

PERMIT2().notice: Canonical Permit2 contract address (same across all EVM chains).

constructor.notice: Deploys the periphery and pre-approves the pool for both tokens.

permit2().notice: Permit2 interface used for gasless ERC-20 approvals.

pool().notice: The CurvePMM pool this periphery routes to.
